title: Survival Wings Rebrushed
description: Adds wearable wings that grant creative flight in survival mode.
body:
Bring creative mode flight to your survival experience! This mod adds different wings that let you take to the skies while maintaining survival mechanics. You’ll have to choose between a chestplate and wings, though.
<details>
<summary>Tiered Wing System</summary>
  
- Feather Wings (500 durability)

- Obsidian Wings (1000 durability)
 
- Nether Wings (1500 durability)
 
- Ender Wings (2200 durability)


</details>

[Original mod by spacechase0](https://github.com/spacechase0/SurvivalWings)
